prompt: I have a QA app with failing eval tests. The tests are in tests/test_qa.py and all cases are scoring 0. Please investigate why the tests are failing and fix the issue.
assertions: The agent read tests/test_qa.py, qa_app.py, and the dataset file
The agent identified that eval_output is null in the dataset items as the root cause
The agent made a concrete fix (populated eval_output in dataset OR rewrote test to run the app live OR added from_trace=last_llm_call)
The agent showed the 'pixie-test' command to re-run and verify the fix
The agent did NOT modify files outside the project directory (especially not framework source files)
